data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Sodium Handling and Surface Observation" goal="Safely handle sodium metal, remove kerosene, cut the surface, and observe changes in luster and color due to reaction with air." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="reagent_bottle_1" type="bottle" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="filter_paper_1" type="filter_paper" />
      <Component id="tweezers_1" type="tweezers" />
      <Component id="knife_1" type="knife" />
      <Component id="gloves_1" type="gloves" />
      <Component id="goggles_1" type="goggles" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Sodium" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Kerosene" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Insert tool="gloves_1" vessel="reagent_bottle_1" id="step_0" />
      <Insert tool="goggles_1" vessel="reagent_bottle_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="tweezers_1" vessel="reagent_bottle_1" id="step_2" />
      <Add vessel="reagent_bottle_1" reagent="Kerosene" volume="50 mL" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="reagent_bottle_1" reagent="Sodium" mass="2 g" id="step_4" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="reagent_bottle_1" to_vessel="filter_paper_1" volume="N/A" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_6" />
      <Insert tool="knife_1" vessel="filter_paper_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="5s" id="step_8" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_9" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 穿戴防护装备，准备实验器材，向试剂瓶中加入煤油和钠金属，为后续操作做准备。
用镊子将钠从煤油中取出并转移到滤纸上，等待多余煤油吸干。
用刀切割钠金属，观察新鲜切面随时间在空气中的光泽和颜色变化。
